title: After Hours
headline: A cinematic brand piece built around chemistry, atmosphere, and elevated lifestyle framing.
description: A warm, intimate brand film that turns a simple dinner setting into a premium visual story. The piece focuses on presence, interaction, texture, and mood, using restrained camera work and polished color to create a refined lifestyle-driven result.
results: Created a premium visual identity around mood and connection
Delivered a polished short-form piece with strong still-worthy frames
Built a versatile asset suitable for portfolio, social, and presentation use

title: Built Daily
headline: A performance-led reel about discipline, routine, and personal brand energy.
description: A dynamic short-form reel combining training, direct-to-camera moments, and everyday discipline. The goal was to create a piece that feels grounded, sharp, and social-first while still carrying a strong visual identity.
results: Turned ordinary daily moments into a strong personal-brand asset
Delivered a short-form piece designed for high replay value
Built a clear social-ready identity through pacing and framing

title: Relocation
headline: An editorial portrait shaped by city rhythm, movement, and documentary texture.
description: This project blends street observation, fashion-aware framing, and personal portraiture into a cinematic editorial piece. From bookstores to transit moments, the film builds identity through environment, gesture, and urban pacing.
results: Built a distinct editorial visual language
Captured a strong set of still-worthy frames and transitions
Created a portrait-driven piece with both cinematic and documentary character

title: City Frequency
headline: A street-driven reel built around motion, color contrast, and night-city energy.
description: A fast, stylized social reel using storefront glow, reflective streets, and movement through the city as the core visual language. The piece is compact, expressive, and designed to hit immediately in a short-form format.
results: Delivered a highly visual reel with strong first-impression value
Used location and color to create instant identity
Built a short-form asset suited for social and portfolio presentation

title: Red Room Session
headline: A performance-focused music visual built on lighting, presence, and controlled studio mood.
description: A stripped-back artist visual where the frame, performance, and lighting do the heavy lifting. The result is minimal but intentional: a clean music-driven piece with strong silhouette, texture, and atmosphere.
results: Created a focused artist visual with a clear mood and identity
Proved that a minimal setup can still feel cinematic and premium
Delivered a performance piece suitable for both promo use and portfolio display
